attacks.name: Doctor Punch
attacks.notes: If this attack deals damage to an enemy monster, heal a monster within 3" for d3 HP.

abilities.name: Doctor
abilities.text: Heal target monster within 6" of Doctor Speeding Ticket for d10 HP.

abilities.name: Speeding Ticket
abilities.text:
Enemy monsters cannot start Move or [[kw:charge|Charge]] actions while within 2" of Doctor Speeding Ticket.

**Contest in Court:** If an enemy within 2" of Doctor Speeding Ticket targets him with a Charge action, ignore this rule until the end of the action.
